spans.anchor_text: Hudson's Bay, on the one hand, and Sponsor A and Sponsor E, on the other hand, were each preliminarily prepared to proceed with the submission of a proposal to acquire Saks at indicative price ranges of $15 to $15.25 per share of common stock
spans.quote_text: Goldman Sachs spoke with representatives of each of Hudsons Bay, Sponsor A and Sponsor E and were informed that Hudsons Bay, on the one hand, and Sponsor A and Sponsor E, on the other hand, were each preliminarily prepared to proceed with the submission of a proposal to acquire Saks at indicative price ranges of $15 to $15.25 per share of common stock (in the case of Hudsons Bay) and $15 to $16 per share of common stock (in the case of Sponsor A and Sponsor E).
spans.quote_text_normalized: goldman sachs spoke with representatives of each of hudson's bay, sponsor a and sponsor e and were informed that hudson's bay, on the one hand, and sponsor a and sponsor e, on the other hand, were each preliminarily prepared to proceed with the submission of a proposal to acquire saks at indicative price ranges of $15 to $15.25 per share of common stock (in the case of hudson's bay) and $15 to $16 per share of common stock (in the case of sponsor a and sponsor e).

spans.anchor_text: Sponsor A and Sponsor E, on the other hand, were each preliminarily prepared to proceed with the submission of a proposal to acquire Saks
spans.quote_text: During the week of June 3, 2013, representatives of Goldman Sachs spoke with representatives of each of Hudsons Bay, Sponsor A and Sponsor E and were informed that Hudsons Bay, on the one hand, and Sponsor A and Sponsor E, on the other hand, were each preliminarily prepared to proceed with the submission of a proposal to acquire Saks at indicative price ranges of $15 to $15.25 per share of common stock (in the case of Hudsons Bay) and $15 to $16 per share of common stock (in the case of Sponsor A and Sponsor E).
spans.quote_text_normalized: during the week of june 3, 2013, representatives of goldman sachs spoke with representatives of each of hudson's bay, sponsor a and sponsor e and were informed that hudson's bay, on the one hand, and sponsor a and sponsor e, on the other hand, were each preliminarily prepared to proceed with the submission of a proposal to acquire saks at indicative price ranges of $15 to $15.25 per share of common stock (in the case of hudson's bay) and $15 to $16 per share of common stock (in the case of sponsor a and sponsor e).

spans.anchor_text: Hudson's Bay was prepared to offer $16 per share of common stock and was agreeable to Saks' position on substantially all of the significant issues in the draft merger agreement
spans.quote_text: July 24, 2013, representatives of Hudsons Bay advised Goldman Sachs that, subject to negotiating a definitive, binding agreement, Hudsons Bay was prepared to offer $16 per share of common stock and was agreeable to Saks position on substantially all of the significant issues in the draft merger agreement and the draft agreements relating to Hudsons Bays committed financing of the merger conveyed by Goldman Sachs to Hudsons Bay.
